name: reparent_game_object
description: Changes the parent of a GameObject in the hierarchy. Set new_parent to an existing GameObject's name, or leave it empty to move the object to the scene root.

game_object.description: Name of the GameObject to reparent.

new_parent.description: Name of the new parent GameObject. Leave empty or omit to move to scene root.

world_position_stays.description: If true (default), the world position/rotation/scale is preserved. If false, the local transform is kept (useful for UI objects).
